title: Profile module restructuring and markdown frontmatter parser
purpose: Norn profiles currently use TOML/JSON via a flat profile.rs file. The norn-agents design requires markdown profiles with YAML frontmatter, matching the 31 existing Meridian profiles at .meridian/profiles/. This brief converts profile.rs into a profile/ folder module and implements frontmatter parsing and capability resolution as libnorn APIs, establishing the foundation for profile scanning (NA-002) and spawn-with-profile (NA-006).
task: Convert profile.rs into a profile/ folder module with types.rs, loader.rs, and resolve.rs. Implement split_frontmatter (own 30-line implementation, not imported from claude-runner) to parse --- delimited YAML frontmatter from markdown files. Implement parse_profile to deserialise YAML frontmatter into a norn-specific RawNornProfileFrontmatter struct and map it to the existing Profile type, with the markdown body becoming the system prompt. Implement parse_capability for markdown capability files. Move capability resolution logic (resolved_tools, resolved_instructions, resolved_disallowed, from_profile) into resolve.rs. Preserve all existing TOML/JSON loading via from_file for backwards compatibility during migration.

requirements.title: Profile folder module structure
requirements.spec: The profile module SHALL be restructured from a single file into a folder module with separate files for types, loading, and resolution.
acceptance: profile/ directory exists with mod.rs, types.rs, loader.rs, resolve.rs
mod.rs contains only pub mod declarations and re-exports
profile.rs is deleted
lib.rs pub mod profile declaration still works (folder module replaces file module transparently)
All existing tests pass without modification to their import paths (re-exports preserve the public API)

requirements.title: Profile and Capability types in types.rs
requirements.spec: The Profile, Capability, and PromptCommand structs SHALL be moved to types.rs with all existing fields preserved and the existing serde derives maintained.
acceptance: Profile struct in profile/types.rs with all current fields: name, model, reasoning_effort, reasoning_summary, tools, system_instructions, capabilities, settings, prompt_commands
Capability struct in profile/types.rs with all current fields: name, tools, system_instructions, disallowed_patterns
PromptCommand struct with name, command, cache_ttl fields and duration_secs serde adapter
Profile::from_file dispatches on extension (.toml, .json, .md) — .md added in R3
Existing TOML and JSON round-trip tests pass

requirements.title: split_frontmatter and markdown profile parser
requirements.spec: The loader SHALL parse markdown files with YAML frontmatter delimited by --- lines, extracting structured fields from the YAML and the markdown body as the system prompt.
acceptance: split_frontmatter(content) -> Result<(&str, &str), ParseError> splits on --- delimiters, returns (yaml, body)
Self-contained implementation (~30 lines), does not import from claude-runner
Handles edge cases: no closing ---, empty body, empty frontmatter, CRLF line endings
parse_profile(content, path) -> Result<Profile, ParseError> calls split_frontmatter, deserialises YAML via serde_yaml into RawNornProfileFrontmatter, maps to Profile

RawNornProfileFrontmatter supports fields: name, description, model, tools (list or comma-separated string), disallowedTools (alias disallowed_tools), reasoning_effort, reasoning_summary, capabilities
Markdown body after frontmatter becomes the first entry in Profile.system_instructions
Profile::from_file with .md extension delegates to parse_profile
Test: parse a markdown profile with all fields, verify Profile struct populated correctly
Test: parse a markdown profile with only name and model, verify defaults for optional fields
Test: split_frontmatter with missing closing --- returns error

requirements.title: Capability parser for markdown capabilities
requirements.spec: The loader SHALL parse markdown capability files with YAML frontmatter, extracting tools, disallowedTools, and prompt_fragment fields.
acceptance: parse_capability(content, path) -> Result<Capability, ParseError> calls split_frontmatter
RawCapabilityFrontmatter supports: name, tools, disallowedTools
Markdown body becomes the capability's system_instructions entry (prompt_fragment)
Test: parse a capability with tools list and body text, verify Capability struct

requirements.title: Capability resolution in resolve.rs
requirements.spec: Capability resolution logic SHALL be extracted into resolve.rs, preserving the existing resolved_tools, resolved_instructions, resolved_disallowed, and from_profile APIs.
acceptance: resolved_tools, resolved_instructions, resolved_disallowed methods remain on Profile (delegating to resolve.rs functions or kept as methods)
from_profile(profile, registry, rules, hooks) -> (LoopContext, ToolRegistry) moved to resolve.rs
Capability resolution merges capabilities into profile: tools union (deduplicated), disallowedTools append, prompt_fragment appends to system instructions
All existing tests for capability composition and from_profile pass without modification
Test: profile with 2 markdown-parsed capabilities, verify merged tools and instructions

boundaries: SHALL NOT implement directory scanning or two-tier resolution — that is NA-002
SHALL NOT modify norn-cli profile_loader.rs or paths.rs — that is NA-002
SHALL NOT remove TOML/JSON support from Profile::from_file — existing profiles must continue to load
SHALL NOT import split_frontmatter or any parsing function from claude-runner
SHALL NOT add todo!() or unimplemented!() macros anywhere
verification: cargo test -p norn — all tests pass including existing profile tests
Markdown profile with YAML frontmatter parses to correct Profile struct — verified by test
Markdown capability parses to correct Capability struct — verified by test
Existing TOML profile round-trip still works — verified by existing test
split_frontmatter edge cases covered — verified by tests
from_profile produces correct LoopContext and gated registry — verified by existing test
